response.original_title: Los Tres Antifaces: The First Body
response.overview: From Peru to the United States, this experimental documentary tells a family’s diasporic history through television channels. A mother and brother are interviewed in Ohio, a grandfather’s last recorded song plays out from Peru, while a solo dancer recalls a familiar yet different routine. These memories flow altered by time from the perspective of a young filmmaker.
response.title: Los Tres Antifaces: The First Body
